tool_args.label: B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service
payload.description: Proposed B82 SBS project in Southern Brooklyn, identified in 2009 BRT Phase II Study
Important east-west transit connection across Southern Brooklyn, connecting to D N F B Q L subway lines and 21 bus routes
payload.limits: Cropsey Avenue/Bay 37 Street to Canarsie area

payload.description: Existing B82 Limited and Local service serving 32,000 daily riders; important east-west transit connection across Southern Brooklyn

issues: route target_record_id route_b82-local implies service_variant "local" but payload implies "limited_and_local"; submit a separate route record or remove the contradictory variant instead of merging service variants

payload.description: Proposed B82 Select Bus Service in Southern Brooklyn. Proposed re-route westbound via Glenwood Rd, connects Kings Hwy to Flatlands Ave via Ave K instead of existing Flatbush Ave, all SBS ending at Cropsey/Bay 37 St

warnings: route.source_route_surface is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Preserves why a route id surface such as B44+ is authoritative.
route.route_id_authority is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Preserves authority before deriving plus/SBS identity.
